emails.subject: PEP Supervisor Change
emails.body: PEP Supervisor Change Ben I have changed your supervisor in PEP from Jeff Donahue to L Don Miller per your request. When did Don become your supervisor? (The Program database shows Jeff Donahue). Are you still in ENA Capital Structuring, CC#105729? Terry

emails.subject: PEP Supervisor Change
emails.body: PEP Supervisor Change Ben I have changed your supervisor in PEP from Jeff Donahue to L Don Miller per your request. When did Don become your supervisor? (The Program database shows Jeff Donahue). Are you still in ENA Capital Structuring, CC#105729? Terry

emails.subject: PEP Supervisor Change
emails.body: PEP Supervisor Change Ben I have changed your supervisor in PEP from Jeff Donahue to L Don Miller per your request. When did Don become your supervisor? (The Program database shows Jeff Donahue). Are you still in ENA Capital Structuring, CC#105729? Terry

emails.subject: Re: PEP Supervisor Change
emails.body: Re: PEP Supervisor Change Jeff Donahue heads up the Corp. Development group for ENA, which Don Miller and I work in. Jeff is Don's supervisor and Don is mine. I have been with this group since around May. Thanks for the quick action with this. Regards, Ben
